children.value: Zapatillas casual de mujer Blazer Mid '77 Next Nature Nike
Sapatilhas casual de mulher Blazer Mid '77 Next Nature
Nike Blazer Mid '77 Next Nature women's casual trainers
Chaussures casual femme Blazer Mid '77 Next Nature Nike

Las Blazer Mid '77 Nature son una versión con estilo de los 70 en un modelo del futuro que contribuye al medioambiente, al sustituir la piel de la parte superior por piel sintética parcialmente reciclada. Un clásico mejorado y fácil de combinar, manteniendo el diseño atemporal e impecable de las Blazer de baloncesto que ahora enamoran a skaters y coleccionistas.

Styled for the '70s. Loved in the '80s. Classic in the '90s. Ready for the future. The Nike Blazer Mid '77 Next Nature now delivers a timeless design made from at least 20% recycled materials by weight. Its unbelievably crisp synthetic leather upper is free of animal ingredients, breaks in beautifully and includes recycled materials. Go ahead, do good by looking good.
This product is made with at least 20% recycled materials by weight.
Whenever you see the Nike Sunburst or the name Next Nature (NN), you see one more step on our journey toward zero carbon and zero waste.
Synthetic leathers and glues are free of animal ingredients. The upper looks crisp and is easy to style.
Autoclave construction fuses the outsole to the midsole for a streamlined look that's timeless.
Exposed foam on the tongue provides a throwback look.
Non-marking, solid-rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for excellent traction and durability that leaves the imprint you love.
Confección vulcanizada que une la suela exterior con la mediasuela
Suela exterior de goma con patrón de espiga.
